title: pavonia conferta
intro: Pavonia conferta, also known as Pavonia odorata or Rose Mallow, is a flowering plant species in the family Malvaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant's roots, leaves, and flowers are rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, which have been known to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, contributing to its health benefits. In herbal preparations, Pavonia conferta is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat conditions such as fever, respiratory issues, and skin problems.
